title: Stablecoin Research Agent
summary: Monitors a synthetic/yield-bearing stablecoin's supply, peg, and backing using its token, factory/pool, and core contracts; emits typed verdicts. Research-only, Arbitrum Sepolia.

sections.heading: Supply
sections.body: Read token.totalSupply over time; classify growth vs contraction.

sections.heading: Backing
sections.body: Read core contract reserve/backing state; compute reserve ratio.

sections.heading: Peg
sections.body: Compare pool price vs $1; flag peg_risk on deviation.
